task_completion.description: Create a swimlane or pool structure with three horizontal lanes for the teams
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagram with three horizontal lanes clearly labeled 'Frontend Team', 'Backend Team', and 'Mobile Team'.

task_completion.description: Include a timeline header divided into four quarters
task_completion.visual_evidence: Columns or headers across the top or bottom of the diagram labeled 'Q1 2025', 'Q2 2025', 'Q3 2025', and 'Q4 2025'.

task_completion.description: Map all initiatives to the correct team swimlane and quarter column
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tasks are placed correctly: 'SSO Integration' in Backend/Q1, 'Dashboard Redesign' in Frontend/Q1, 'iOS App Beta' in Mobile/Q2, 'API Migration' in Backend/Q2, 'Android Launch' in Mobile/Q3, and 'Dark Mode' in Frontend/Q4.

task_completion.description: Apply correct fill colors based on task status
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'SSO Integration' is filled with green (Completed). 'Dashboard Redesign', 'API Migration', 'Android Launch', and 'Dark Mode' are filled with blue (Planned). 'iOS App Beta' is filled with red (Risky).

task_completion.description: Include a diamond shape for the 'Product Launch v2.0' milestone at the end of Q2
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diamond-shaped node labeled 'Product Launch v2.0' is present in the Q2 column.

task_completion.description: Save as roadmap.drawio and export as roadmap.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window title shows 'roadmap.drawio', an export dialog is visible, or the files 'roadmap.drawio' and 'roadmap.png' are visible on the Desktop in a file manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io application to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io (diagrams.net) graphical user interface is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python or bash scripts generating the XML or PNG files directly without using the draw.io interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task mapping requirements: 1. SSO Integration (Backend, Q1, Completed -> Green). 2. Dashboard Redesign (Frontend, Q1, Planned -> Blue). 3. iOS App Beta (Mobile, Q2, Risky -> Red). 4. API Migration (Backend, Q2, Planned -> Blue). 5. Android Launch (Mobile, Q3, Planned -> Blue). 6. Dark Mode (Frontend, Q4, Planned -> Blue). Milestone: 'Product Launch v2.0' (End of Q2, Diamond shape).
